title: cryptantha cinerea var. jamesii
intro: Cryptantha cinerea var. jamesii, also known as James' cryptantha, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. James' cryptantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote respiratory health and relieve congestion.
